Itsolutions.Itslearning.Web.RestApi.Personal.Page.PageApiModels.ImageMetaData

Update metadata for an existing image within an "images" content block.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
ImageId

The ID of the image to update.

 integer

None.
AltText

The alt text for the image (used for accessibility). Keep null to leave unchanged.

 string

None.
Caption

The caption for the image. Keep null to leave unchanged.

 string

None.
